password.title: Powerwall Gateway password
password.description: Enter the WiFi hotspot password for **{site_name}** — it is on the sticker behind the gateway door. Leave blank to skip this site.

pair_install.title: Pair Powerwall key
pair_install.description: A pairing key has been sent to your Powerwall Gateway(s). Toggle the disconnect switch on each gateway, then continue. (attempt {attempt})

lan_verify.title: Verify gateway connection
lan_verify.description: Confirming a local connection to **{site_name}**. Adjust the host or password if verification fails.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate {name}
reauth_confirm.description: The Powerwall V1R integration needs to re-authenticate with Tesla.

error.pair_pending: The gateway hasn't confirmed the key yet. Toggle the disconnect switch and try again.
error.cannot_connect_local: Could not reach the gateway at that host.

abort.already_configured: This energy site is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Tesla Fleet API.
abort.subscription_required: A Tesla Fleet API subscription is required.
abort.no_sites: No energy sites were found on this account.
abort.pair_install_failed: Failed to install the pairing key on the gateway.
